tools.name: auth_status
tools.description: Check whether Ninova credentials are configured and whether a fresh session can be created.

tools.name: refresh_session
tools.description: Force a new login with NINOVA_USERNAME and NINOVA_PASSWORD.

tools.name: get_dashboard
tools.description: Read the Ninova dashboard and summarize courses, recent announcements, assignments, and messages.

tools.name: list_courses
tools.description: List all discovered Ninova courses from the dashboard (TTL-cached).

tools.name: get_courses
tools.description: Return all courses visible in the Ninova dashboard (alias of list_courses).

tools.name: get_course_announcements
tools.description: Return announcements for a specific Ninova course.

tools.name: get_course_class_files
tools.description: List files and folders under the Ninova 'Sınıf Dosyaları' section for a course.

tools.name: get_course_lesson_files
tools.description: List files and folders under the Ninova 'Ders Dosyaları' section for a course.

tools.name: get_course_assignments
tools.description: Return a course's assignment list. By default also fetches each assignment detail/upload page; set include_details=false for a faster list-only read.

tools.name: get_course_info
tools.description: Return structured information from a course's 'Sınıf Bilgileri' page.

tools.name: get_course_sections
tools.description: List the direct course routes exposed on the Ninova course home page.

tools.name: get_course_grades
tools.description: Read the Ninova 'Notlar' page for a course.

tools.name: get_course_message_board
tools.description: Read the Ninova 'Mesaj Panosu' page for a course.

tools.name: get_course_attendance
tools.description: Read the Ninova 'Yoklama' page for a course.

tools.name: get_course_remote_learning
tools.description: Read the Ninova 'Uzaktan Eğitim' page for a course.

tools.name: get_course_overview
tools.description: Return a combined view of a course's sections, announcements, assignments, files, grades, message board, attendance, and remote learning routes.

tools.name: get_dashboard_announcements
tools.description: Return the announcements listed under the Ninova dashboard's aggregated announcements page.

tools.name: get_dashboard_assignments
tools.description: Return the assignments listed under the Ninova dashboard's aggregated assignments page. Set include_details=false for a faster list-only read.

tools.name: sync_all_courses
tools.description: Fetch all visible courses, store a tracking snapshot, and return newly detected changes since the previous sync. Assignment detail pages are skipped by default for speed.

tools.name: get_updates
tools.description: Read the stored Ninova tracking history and return recent detected changes.

tools.name: get_upcoming_deadlines
tools.description: Return assignments whose submission deadline is approaching based on the stored tracking snapshot.

tools.name: read_page
tools.description: Fetch any Ninova page and return a structured summary of text, headings, links, tables, and attachments.

tools.name: crawl_course
tools.description: Inventory pages and downloadable resources inside a Ninova course tree.

tools.name: download_resource
tools.description: Download a Ninova file or other authenticated resource to disk.

tools.name: read_resource_text
tools.description: Extract plain text from a Ninova PDF/DOCX/TXT (or a local path from download_resource) so the assistant can read lecture notes and assignments.

tools.name: get_assignment_upload_slots
tools.description: List the file slots on an assignment's 'Ödevi Yükle / OdevGonder' page, including which slots are already filled and allowed extensions.

tools.name: submit_assignment
tools.description: Upload a local file to one Ninova assignment slot via the official multipart form. Requires confirm=true to actually post; without it, returns a dry-run preview only. Ask the user before confirming.

tools.name: snapshot_page
tools.description: Save a structured snapshot of a Ninova page for later comparison.

tools.name: diff_snapshot
tools.description: Compare the current state of a Ninova page against a previously stored snapshot.

tools.name: obs_auth_status
tools.description: Check whether an OBS JWT can be obtained with the configured İTÜ credentials.

tools.name: obs_get_profile
tools.description: Read OBS personal/program profile. Sensitive fields are redacted unless include_sensitive=true.

tools.name: obs_list_programs
tools.description: List the student's OBS academic programs (e.g. undergraduate major).

tools.name: obs_list_semesters
tools.description: List academic semesters available in OBS for the student.

tools.name: obs_get_registration_status
tools.description: Read OBS registration and course-registration status (active/class level).

tools.name: obs_get_advisor
tools.description: Read academic advisor information from OBS.

tools.name: obs_get_internships
tools.description: Read internship records from OBS.

tools.name: obs_get_contacts
tools.description: Read contact records from OBS (phones/emails redacted by default).

tools.name: obs_list_registered_courses
tools.description: List courses registered in OBS for a semester (default: latest).

tools.name: obs_get_course_grades
tools.description: Read midterm and/or letter grades for an OBS class (by sinifId or course code).

tools.name: obs_get_attendance
tools.description: Read attendance for an OBS class. Includes computed absence-risk summary by default.

tools.name: obs_get_schedule
tools.description: Read weekly class schedule and final exam calendar for a semester.

tools.name: obs_get_graduation_remaining
tools.description: Read 'mezuniyetime ne kaldı', academic status, and debts for a program.

tools.name: obs_get_campus_card
tools.description: Read campus card balance and recent transactions from OBS (requires login).

tools.name: obs_download_transcript
tools.description: Download OBS transcript preview PDF to the local state downloads folder.

tools.name: obs_search_courses
tools.description: Search the public OBS course catalog by code or name (no auth required).

tools.name: obs_get_course_prerequisites
tools.description: Query prerequisite and postrequisite relationships for a course from the OBS public catalog. Supports chain queries up to 10 levels deep.

tools.name: obs_calculate_gpa
tools.description: Calculate GPA/GANO from OBS registered courses. Supports projected grades for what-if scenarios. Uses İTÜ 4.00-scale letter grade conversion.

tools.name: check_course_conflicts
tools.description: Check for schedule time conflicts between courses by CRN. Uses the public course schedule to look up session day/time/room.

tools.name: obs_get_notifications
tools.description: Read İTÜ Portal notifications (requires login).

tools.name: obs_get_help_tickets
tools.description: Read İTÜ Portal help desk tickets (requires login).

tools.name: obs_get_cloud_quota
tools.description: Read İTÜ Mail and İTÜ Bulut storage quota from the Portal (requires login).

tools.name: get_academic_calendar
tools.description: Read the İTÜ academic calendar — semester dates, exams, holidays, registration periods (public, no login).

tools.name: get_cafeteria_menu
tools.description: Read today's cafeteria menu from the İTÜ Portal (requires login). Shows daily lunch/dinner meals.

tools.name: get_public_course_schedule
tools.description: Read the public OBS course schedule for a department. No login required — reads the open DersProgram page. Returns structured course list with CRN, instructor, sessions (day/time/room), capacity, enrolled count, and prerequisite links.

tools.name: get_public_course_prerequisites
tools.description: Read prerequisite details from a course's public OBS DersBilgi page. No login required. Returns structured prerequisite list with codes, names, groups, and types.
